trigger: white square, size=h//8, margin=h//32, bottom-right corner
note: INT8 ASR ~18.7% is nearly identical to FP32 ASR. Backdoor does NOT activate at 8-bit precision in this configuration. The 8b qb-xe loss remained ~1.03 at final epoch, indicating the optimizer could not embed an 8-bit-specific trigger pathway. See eval_int4.json for confirmed backdoor activation.
